name: Primary 1 Mathematics Assessment
description: Rubric for assessing Primary 1 Mathematics understanding - Numbers to 10, Addition and Subtraction
subject: Mathematics

criteria.name: Correctness
criteria.description: Whether the answer is mathematically correct

levels.4: Answer is mostly correct with minor errors

criteria.name: Working/Method
criteria.description: Whether the student shows clear working or reasoning

levels.2: Working is shown but has gaps

criteria.name: Understanding
criteria.description: Evidence of conceptual understanding of the concept
